name: Qing Shui Mentorship
description: Qing Shui teaches Wang Lin the Heaven-Trampling Dao, the capstone of his cultivation.
_comment: Karmic Nexus node: Qing Shui Mentorship. Per architectural review: RI is a novel about karma. karmic_weight is signed (+ = debt owed TO bearer, - = grudge held BY bearer). Prime Directive: unresolved karma persists objectively until paid.
